flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Gateway Community and Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Gateway Community and Technical College fell 58% between 2021 and 2024 ($15.3k → $6.4k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Gateway Community and Technical College rose 26% between 2021 and 2024 (2.5k → 3.2k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Gateway Community and Technical College rose 22% between 2006 and 2009 (26.5% → 32.4%).
